response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and open-source experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ expertise in industrial automation contexts, with only a brief, non-detailed mention of C++ in a 6-month role at National Instruments; no evidence of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial protocols, and primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, making him a poor fit for a senior C++ architect role in automation.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and open-source development experience across diverse domains
Strong documentation, teaching, and community contribution background
Proven ability to work with complex systems and contribute to DevOps infrastructure
concerns: Minimal and outdated C++ experience (6 months, 10+ years ago), no recent hands-on use
No evidence of industrial automation, IoT protocols, or IEC 62443 security standards
Primary technical focus is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not C++ system-level development
